creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 245414
Patch for mpg123

Compile and tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)

Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers in 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere:
audio/audacity
audio/audiowmark
audio/cantata
audio/d11amp
audio/gstreamer1-plugins-mpg123
audio/harp
audio/libopenmpt
audio/libsndfile
audio/mous (fails, unrelated and marked BROKEN)
audio/mp3gain
audio/py-fmoo-audiotools
audio/sdl2_mixer
audio/sdl_audiolib
audio/sidplayfp
audio/squeezelite
audio/wavbreaker
audio/welle.io
audio/zmusic
devel/love
devel/love07
devel/love08
devel/love10
games/easyrpg-player
games/re3
multimedia/audacious-plugins
multimedia/musikcube
audio/baudline
audio/fdmf
audio/mp3burn
audio/mpg123.el
audio/musiccontrol
multimedia/lives (fails, FFmpeg related, unrelated to this update)
net/asterisk16
net/asterisk18
sysutils/mybashburn
